name: Nancy's Vegetable Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the cream cheese and Catalina dressing until fluffy.
2. Serve with raw vegetable dippers or pipe onto raw vegetables cut into attractive bite-size pieces using a pastry bag and serrated tip.
Notes:
Do not over-beat, and keep as cool as possible. If it sits in a warm place for too long, it tends to separate; no harm done, but it looks rather strange. The light versions of the ingredients will work, but if made completely fat-free, the texture is not as pleasing.
